message.content:
@startuml
title PCWS Sequences

actor "Customer" as Customer
participant "PCWS" as PCWS
database "PostgreSQL" as PostgreSQL
database "Disk" as Disk
participant "transfer_logs.sh" as transfer_logs_sh
participant "Account Service" as AccountService
participant "Datalog Service" as DatalogService

Customer -> PCWS : request image
activate PCWS
PCWS -> AccountService : check account permission
deactivate AccountService
PCWS -> PCWS : generate image
PCWS -> Disk : write data log
PCWS -> Customer : image
deactivate PCWS

note right of Disk : some time later

loop [for each log]
  Disk -> PCWS : read data log
  PCWS -> DatalogService : send data log
  DatalogService -> PCWS : (response)
endloop

@enduml
